body:
## Purpose 
Add GPU-compatible Orographic Gravity Wave (OGW) implementation and modernize Non-Orographic Gravity Wave (NOGW) tests to use full ClimaAtmos infrastructure with ClimaParams.

## Content

### GPU Orographic Gravity Wave implementation
- Refactored OGW code for GPU compatibility (no allocations on GPU; see updated GW flame graph test)
- Added ClimaParams integration for tunable parameters (`ogw_*` parameters)
- Added OGW module to callbacks (controlled by `dt_ogw` parameter)
- Added topography preprocessing pipeline (`preprocess_topography.jl`)
- Migrated computed drag artifacts to ClimaArtifacts system with local fallback

### NOGW test modernization
- Migrated single column, 3D, and MIMA tests to use full ClimaAtmos infrastructure
- Tests now use ClimaParams via YAML configs and TOML parameter files
- Renamed test files: `nogw_test_*.jl` -> `test_nogw_*.jl`
- Added YAML configs (`column_nogw_3d_test.yml`, `sphere_nogw_mima_test.yml`, `single_column_nonorographic_gravity_wave.yml`)
- Added TOML parameter files (`nogw_mima_test.toml`, `nogw_single_column_test.toml`)

### OGW tests and validation
- Added Garner 2005 figure reproduction test (`test_garner2005_reproduction.jl`)
- Added OGW base flux test (`test_ogw_baseflux.jl`)
- Added OGW computed drag test (`test_ogw_computed_drag.jl`)
- Added 3D OGW test with 3-panel comparison plots: raw topo vs GFDL vs reference (`test_ogw_3d.jl`)
- Added shared test utilities (`ogw_test_utils.jl`) and remap/plot utilities (`gw_remap_plot_utils.jl`)
- Added topography preprocessing script (`compute_preprocessed_topography.jl`)
- Removed old `ogwd_3d.jl` and `ogwd_baseflux.jl` (replaced by new tests)

### Documentation and cleanup
- Expanded gravity wave documentation with updated PBL top formulation and notation fixes
- Updated CI pipeline to use new test file names and added OGW computed drag and Garner 2005 jobs
- Updated `ref_counter` to 317

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: GW drag parametrization

body:
While trying to update the CI for ClimaDiagnostics to use 1.12 in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaDiagnostics.jl/pull/158, the downstream test for ClimaAtmos doesn't pass, because of the compat for CairoMakie.

This PR loosen the compat for CairoMakie to allow for the latest version. The compat should be updated later when ClimaAtmos is updated to use 1.12  as CairoMakie 0.11 uses the internals of Julia which break on Julia 1.12.
title: Update compat for CairoMakie

## Purpose 
This PR:
- ensures that minimum entrainment and detrainment rates are equal to their invariant time scales (`entr_inv_tau` and `detr_inv_tau`),
- Changes entrainment and detrainment area fraction threshold to eps to allow area growth when it's smaller than a_min
